title: Cat Variant Eggs
description: Adds spawn eggs for all Cat Variants
body:
Adds spawn eggs for all Cat Variants


Vanilla Minecraft only includes one spawn egg for cats... despite having 11 variants!

This mod makes life easier by adding spawn eggs for each variant. All are locatable next to the Cat Spawn Egg in the Spawn Eggs Creative Tab.

Dependencies:
- [Spawn Egg BYID Redirect](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-egg-byid-redirect)
